expectations.evidence: No ╔══╗ box trade card. Response uses tables instead of the structured card format.
Short Strike Delta confirmed as −0.15 with detailed Black-Scholes derivation. States 'Short Strike Delta: −0.15 (target met)'.
States 'Probability of Profit: ~85%' — correctly derived from 1 − |delta|.
$162.50 strike when stock is $180.40 = 9.92% OTM — just barely under the 10% threshold. Fails due to shorter DTE (29 vs 42) yielding a less OTM strike for the same delta.
Net credit $1.45, max profit $145, max loss $855, breakeven $161.05, PoP ~85%, ROR 17% — all present.
